seoTitle: Roanoke County Public Schools Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Roanoke County Public Schools 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 14 first day, May 28 last day, holidays, breaks, graduations, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Roanoke County Public Schools starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 14, 2025. Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, Spring Break runs March 23-27, and the last day of school is May 28, 2026. The calendar lists 178 total student days and includes early dismissals, grading periods, high school virtual days, graduation ceremonies, and make-up day notes.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Roanoke County Public Schools start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The first student day is Thursday, August 14, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Roanoke County Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 23 through Friday, March 27, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Roanoke County in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last student day and end of second semester is Thursday, May 28, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: How many student days are on the RCPS 2025-2026 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists 178 total days.
